/* Library Function - Multiple Matches With Different Base Names
    __atodbl
    __atoflt

int __cdecl FID_conflict___atodbl(_CRT_FLOAT *_Result,char *_Str)

{
  INTRNCVT_STATUS IVar1;
  int local_10;
  _LDBL12 local_c;
  
  FUN_0045eef0((ushort *)&local_c,&local_10,(byte *)_Str,0,0,0,0);

}
